clips.label: HOOK CLIP
clips.detailed_prompt: SUBJECT: A 7-month-old infant baby with fair to light olive skin, light brown hair, blue-gray eyes, wearing a soft pale yellow footed onesie. A woman in her early 30s with fair to light olive skin, light brown hair in a low ponytail, blue-gray eyes, wearing a soft oatmeal knit sweater and dark jeans. SETTING: Suburban American home nursery, dimly lit. ACTION: The woman, the primary parent, holds the infant baby in her arms, looking concerned. The infant appears listless and uncomfortable, with infant proportions (large head, chubby cheeks, short limbs, cannot walk or stand unsupported). MOOD: Tense. CAMERA: Gentle handheld. LIGHTING: Dark and moody. STYLE: Cinematic realistic footage. 4K. Natural colors. No animation. No text on screen.
clips.veo_prompt: A 7-month-old infant baby, an infant developmental category, with fair to light olive skin, light brown hair, blue-gray eyes, and wearing a soft pale yellow footed onesie, is held by a woman in her early 30s. The woman, who has fair to light olive skin, light brown hair in a low ponytail, blue-gray eyes, and is wearing a soft oatmeal knit sweater and dark jeans, looks concerned. The infant baby, displaying typical infant proportions with a large head, chubby cheeks, and short limbs, appears unwell and listless, unable to walk or stand unsupported. The scene is set in a dimly lit suburban American home nursery. The camera uses a gentle handheld shot with dark and moody lighting, capturing cinematic realistic footage in 4K with natural colors, no animation, and no on-screen text.
